title: lotononis densa subsp. gracilis
intro: Lotononis densa subsp. gracilis is a sub-species of the Lotononis densa plant, a type of flowering plant in the Fabaceae family native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating gastrointestinal issues, and aiding in wound healing, due to its bioactive compounds and flavonoids. Herbal preparations of Lotononis densa subsp. gracilis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for medicinal purposes.
